hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" 2>/dev/null || true; code=$(git status --porcelain -- Assets/Scripts 2>/dev/null); docs=$(git status --porcelain -- docs README.md AGENTS.md 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$code" ] && [ -z "$docs" ]; then printf '%s' '{"systemMessage":"Code under Assets/Scripts changed but docs/TODO were not updated. Per AGENTS.md, update the relevant doc before wrapping up."}'; fi
